case_title: SALAHEDDIN KARRIEM ABDUL AL-BARI VS. FARZIN FAILI

docket_entries.description: SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF ABDUL AL-BARI, SALAHEDDIN KARRIEM AS TO DEFENDANT FAILI, FARZIN

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-05-2021 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-05-2021 BY MICHELLE TONG. PLAINTIFF SALAHEDDIN KARRIEM ABDUL AL-BARI IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT FARZIN FAILI IS PRESENT WITH WITNESS SERENA TAM, STATE FARM. PLAINTIFF AND DEFENDANT EXHIBITS RETAINED. PRIOR TO THE HEARING, HONORABLE MICHELLE TONG PRESENTED DISCLOSURE, AND LITIGATE(S)DID NOT OBJECT. JUDGE: MICHELLE TONG; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN. NOT REPORTED.(D506)
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $10,000.00 FILED BY ABDUL AL-BARI, SALAHEDDIN KARRIEM AS TO DEFENDANT FAILI, FARZIN ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-05-2021 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-05-2021 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ABDUL AL-BARI, SALAHEDDIN KARRIEM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT FAILI, FARZIN $8,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $160.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $8,160.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
